name: music-share-electron
description: MusicShare — Electron + TypeScript shared music listening app

scripts.start: npx esbuild src/renderer/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && shx cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && electron dist/main/main/main.js
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && npx esbuild src/renderer/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && shx cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html
scripts.lint: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
